title: Bestehende Werkzeuge anbinden

style.aesthetic: flat minimal UI, fine-line borders, clean tech illustration inspired by modern SaaS design (Linear, Vercel aesthetic)
style.rendering: clean vector style, flat surfaces with 1px borders, no gradients on surfaces, sharp but refined edges, subtle depth through layering and thin shadows only

background: #FFFFFF (pure white, no grid, no pattern, no texture)
description: A compact illustration showing a connector visualization: three small abstract app icons arranged in a row — each is a small rounded square (6px radius) in different colors: #EF476F, #118AB2, #06D6A0 — representing different everyday tools (generic, no real logos). Below each square, a tiny label: 'E-Mail', 'Aufgaben', 'Projekte' in 10px #8A8F98. Thin 1px connecting lines in #D1D5DB from each square converge downward into a single point, forming a merge pattern. Below the merge point, a small checkmark circle in #06D6A0. The illustration conveys: Verbinde deine bestehenden Werkzeuge wie E-Mail, Aufgabenlisten oder Projektboards an einem Ort.
no: 3d perspective, photorealism, people, hands, faces, stock photo elements, real brand logos (no Slack, no Gmail, no Trello logos), terminal/command line, code editors, programming syntax, glassmorphism, glow effects, gradient fills, dark backgrounds, English text — all visible text must be German
